title: Big Miku Plush totem
description: Replaces the totem of undying with a BIG miku plush
body:
Have you ever wanted something you can soak in milk, violently throw against a wall, and make a loud wet thud with? Well, this resource pack is not for you! That only works with a real plush :(

BUT if you're a broke loser unlike me (look below), than I have made an alternative just for **_YOU!_**\*
![My miku collection consisting of a plush and two figurines. It was very hard to take this photo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7977f04846c33aede0c2ff9c963be74d66d0ecb6.jpeg)

# MIKU TOTEM!
![Miku Plush on the ground](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/A503iSee/images/363817b8615d771679e50dca5d5576a57ab77690.png)
Granted with the protection of Miku and God, you can overcome any obstacle as long as it doesn't deal 2.5 hearts of damage the second Miku protects you

# Features
- Properly named Miku Plush in English!
- A custom sound with a choir of Mikus with Miku saying "I am the way, the truth, and the life"
- Blasphemy! Yeah Miku isn't actually Jesus :(
- And most importantly, she is very big. Not fat (cough cough), but big

# Why?
:D

*This was meant for a general audiance. You're not special. I don't know who you are nor will I likely ever. I don't care what you do with this mod or how it makes you feel.
